subject: Natural Sciences
title: Robot Maker
tagline: Design and build a robot — apply engineering design and problem-solving!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is a robot?
options: They can work without risking human safety
A machine that can be programmed to perform tasks
stages.correctOption: A machine that can be programmed to perform tasks
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A machine that can be programmed to perform tasks is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A machine that can be programmed to perform tasks.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What do sensors help a robot do?
options: Detect and respond to its environment
stages.correctOption: Detect and respond to its environment
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Detect and respond to its environment is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Detect and respond to its environment.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What powers most robots?
options: A machine that can be programmed to perform tasks
Detect and respond to its environment
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Electricity and batteries is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Electricity and batteries.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What is a robot 'actuator'?
options: Detect and respond to its environment
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A part that creates movement is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A part that creates movement.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What field of study includes designing robots?
options: They can work without risking human safety
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Robotics.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: What do we call the instructions that tell a robot what to do?
options: They can work without risking human safety
Detect and respond to its environment
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A program or code is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A program or code.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: Where are robots commonly used in factories?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Assembly lines is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Assembly lines.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What is an example of a robot used at home?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A robot vacuum cleaner is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A robot vacuum cleaner.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What must a robot have to move around?
options: Detect and respond to its environment
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Motors and wheels or legs is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Motors and wheels or legs.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: Why are robots useful for dangerous jobs?
options: They can work without risking human safety
stages.correctOption: They can work without risking human safety
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! They can work without risking human safety is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is They can work without risking human safety.
